recommendations.title: Recommendations
recommendations.subtitle: Personalized tips based on your last 7 days of entries.
recommendations.breathingDesc: Inhale for 4 seconds, hold for 4 seconds, exhale for 6 seconds. Repeat 5×. Helps reduce stress and calm the mind.
recommendations.walkDesc: Even 10 minutes of walking in fresh air can improve your mood. Try noticing your surroundings — trees, sounds, clouds.
recommendations.gratitudeDesc: Conscious gratitude has been proven to increase overall satisfaction. You can write it directly in your journal.
recommendations.connectDesc: Call or message someone you care about. Social connection is one of the strongest factors in mental well-being.
recommendations.sleepDesc: Put your phone away an hour before bed. Try reading a book or meditating. Quality sleep is the foundation of a good mood.
recommendations.bodyscanDesc: Lie down, close your eyes, and gradually focus on each part of your body from feet to head. Release the tension.
recommendations.movementDesc: You don't need the gym. Dancing, yoga, swimming, cycling — anything that energizes and brings you joy.
recommendations.detoxDesc: Take a break from social media for at least 2 hours. Notice how you feel without constant scrolling.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your preferences and app settings.
settings.dailyReminderDesc: Remind you to record your mood every day.
settings.onboardingDesc: Show onboarding guide on next login.
